description: Composition Blue mock neck jersey made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, mesh panel stitch on both sides of the chest and embroidered branding on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately at less than 30 degrees Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; do not iron on print/trims/logo Sweat it out in comfort on the tracks or at the gym in this jersey engineered with Climacool technology from adidas. The fabric regulates your body temperature, keeping you fresh and comfortable and offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with adidas trackpants and running shoes for the best results. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
